name: calendly
description: Search Calendly events and availability so Codex can reason about meetings and scheduling.

interface.shortDescription: Search Calendly meetings, events, and availability.
interface.longDescription: Calendly connects Codex to your scheduling workflows so you can inspect upcoming meetings, review event details, reason about availability, and summarize attendee follow-ups.
defaultPrompt: Find my upcoming Calendly meetings and summarize who I am meeting with.
Check Calendly availability for this week and suggest open meeting slots.
Review recent Calendly events and summarize attendee details and follow-ups.
